name: upstream-jq-test-l1847
compat_reason: jq 1.8.2 for Windows emits non-UTF-8 mojibake for localized strftime names in this release artifact; jqx emits UTF-8 English names
compat_removal_condition: jq Windows release artifacts emit stable UTF-8 strftime names or jqx intentionally adopts platform-locale encoded output

name: upstream-jq-test-l2014
compat_reason: latest jq release artifacts enable decimal-number support, while jqx currently preserves numeric source text for formatting but does not implement full decimal arithmetic; have_decnum remains false to avoid advertising unsupported arithmetic semantics
compat_removal_condition: jqx implements full decimal-number arithmetic and can truthfully expose have_decnum, or upstream adds a profile matching jqx numeric-representation semantics

name: upstream-jq-test-l2602
compat_reason: jq 1.8.2 reports "Containment check too deep" for this deep contains case; jqx currently completes the operation instead of enforcing the jq depth guard
compat_removal_condition: jqx implements the jq 1.8.2 deep contains guard or jq upstream changes/removes this guard
